name: Anhui Julong Transmission Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Julong Transmission Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of gear clutches for washing machines. It offers dual-drive, double-wheel, 16 kg large-capacity, and direct-drive motor deceleration clutches, as well as other series products; and finishing shafts. Anhui Julong Transmission Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Ningguo, China.
